embeddingText: Kontorstjänster och annan stödverksamhet till företag. B2B-tjänsteföretag med fokus på administration, företagsstöd, kontorsservice, dokumenthantering, kundservice, backoffice, reception, supportfunktioner, referenser, team, kontaktformulär och tydlig tjänstepresentation.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold for businesses that sell office-related support or administrative services to other companies.
Prefer this scaffold when the key conversion is contact or quote request rather than ecommerce checkout or appointment booking.
Strong matches include firms describing administration, reception, customer service, document support, invoicing support or similar outsourced business support functions.
